Name: the Arc-Royal Defense Cordon
Description: The Arc-Royal Defense Cordon is a region of space in the Lyran Alliance ruled by Grand Duke Morgan Kell. When Katherine Steiner-Davion claimed independence for the Lyran half of the Federated Commonwealth, several of her most prominent detractors began to move against her. One of those detractors was the Duke of Arc-Royal, and de facto leader of Heimdall, Morgan Kell. In response to Katherine's power grab, Morgan declared himself Grand Duke of sixteen Lyran worlds along the Clan Jade Falcon border, ostensibly to ensure their defense against the powerful Clan. Officially, Katherine thanked Kell for taking charge of the defense for the worlds and made it seem as if he had done so with her consent, but, behind the scenes, she began plotting to destroy the ARDC and remove Morgan Kell as a threat to her realm.
ReputationStatements: We have a job for you, treacherous scum. As distasteful as that is to us.

You know what I love best about mercenaries? You're willing to wade into battle when it's too dangerous for us to risk our own soldiers. So take the job, MechWarrior - fight and die for money, as is your role.
Greetings, Commander. Arc-Royal requires aid from someone outside of our own forces. Hopefully you can help us.
Hail, Commander. The Arc-Royal Defense Cordon has an urgent task we think is well-suited to your MRB rating. We offer premium rates.
I hope you are in fine health, Commander. Reliable mercenaries are an asset the Arc-Royal Defense Cordon is always willing to invest in. We pay exceptionally well you know.
Commander, Arc-Royal needs help, and you're the best positioned to lend it. Due to your exceptional record and the hazardous nature of this request, we are willing to pay premium rates.
Ah, Commander! Arc-Royal sends you wishes of good health and full coffers. We think this ARDC contract might best be handled by an expert such as yourself. As always, we offer the highest rates.
MissionSuccessStatements: Capital work, Commander. I'm glad to see that your MRB rating didn't lead me astray - you've got chops, and you know how to get the job done.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Today brought disappointment, but disappointment is a teacher like any other. You fought well, Commander.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Arc-Royal has no place for cowards or failures, Commander. Ensure your future efforts are more robust, or the Defense Cordon will be closed to you.
